summary: Closed representative #40817 is obsolete: current main already contains Korean Control UI localization through the generated locale pipeline. The only surviving Korean-language item is #53345, but its remaining scope mixes already-implemented UI localization with AI-agent language policy and carries no-new-fix-pr/product-decision labels, so it needs maintainer judgment rather than an autonomous fix PR. Open #62063 is a separate Swedish locale PR and should stay open as related independent localization work.
